_comment: Ship of Tools codex adapter (ADR 0031) — state-nav hooks. EVENT KEYS ARE snake_case (verified against the codex 0.142 binary: user_prompt_submit/post_tool_use/stop/permission_request — PascalCase keys are silently ignored, the original silent-no-color bug). Deployed to ~/.codex/hooks.json by ShipTools.update_comm(). Same bin scripts as the Claude Code adapter (the payloads share the field names that matter — notably `prompt`), so the state HIERARCHY (blocked/red > working/green > waiting/purple, 2360fca) is enforced identically: the working hook's machine-turn guard, the heartbeat's waiting->working promotion, soft idle's sticky demote. All scripts self-gate on the pane's registry row, so codex sessions OUTSIDE Ship of Tools are silent no-ops. PermissionRequest maps to blocked (codex's nearest 'needs the user').
